Support Cape Cod Makers

Cape Cod Makers is a community-supported makerspace. Your donations help us:

  • Maintain and repair our tools and equipment
  • Purchase new equipment to expand our offerings
  • Keep membership rates affordable for everyone
  • Host free and low-cost community workshops
  • Pay for our facility costs (rent, utilities, insurance)

Every dollar contributed directly supports our mission to provide access to tools and maker education for our Cape Cod community.

Support Cape Cod Makers

Your donation helps us maintain our equipment, pay rent, and keep the space accessible to everyone on Cape Cod. Every contribution makes a difference.

Donate via PayPal Open Collective

Cape Cod Makers is a non-profit organization. Donations may be tax-deductible. Please consult your tax advisor.

Other Ways to Support Us

🔧

Donate Equipment

Have tools or equipment you no longer need? We may be able to accept donations. Contact us to find out.

🤝

Volunteer

Help with events, maintenance, or teach a workshop. Your time and expertise are invaluable to our community.

📢

Spread the Word

Tell your friends and neighbors about Cape Cod Makers. Word of mouth is our best marketing.

Cape Cod Makers

Harwich, MA 02645
